sections.heading: Changelog in use
sections.body: This changelog demonstrates release-note structure with changes grouped by user impact.

cards.title: Added
cards.body: Template-specific example payloads for all gallery outputs.

cards.title: Changed
cards.body: Gallery cards now link to generated output pages.

cards.title: Fixed
cards.body: Light mode no longer uses the warm paper values that made the page look milky yellow.
